@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: async_await(loadUser)∧minimal_async_await(loadUser)
P: missing_id_before_db(loadUser)→promisify(db.findUser) ∧ promisify(db.findUser)→not_found_before_audit(loadUser) ∧ not_found_before_audit(loadUser)
V: same_order
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: async/await(loadUser) and minimal async/await migration(loadUser).
Plan: missing id check before database call(loadUser) then promisify(db.findUser) and promisify(db.findUser) then not found check before audit(loadUser) and not found check before audit(loadUser).
Verify: same validation order.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

V: same_order(createInvoice)∧one_next(err)

Answer target: minimal async/await migration.
